candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is a COGS-related D&A component, but it appears as a sub-component of the selected parent COGS total ('Cost of goods sold' / 'Cost of Revenues - Total'), so adding it separately would double count.
This is a COGS-related D&A component, but it sits beneath and is already embedded in the selected COGS total row, so it should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is also COGS-related depreciation, but it is presented as a component within the selected COGS total structure rather than a separate same-level expense to add later.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is the parent total 'Cost of goods sold'. The statement shows detailed cost-of-revenue components beneath that total, including amortization and depreciation lines. Those D&A rows reconcile into the selected total, so they are already embedded and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling Expenses
candidates.why: This is an SG&A-related D&A component, but it appears to be included within the selected parent row 'Selling Expenses', so adding it separately would double count.
This is a component of the selected 'Selling Expenses' total and therefore already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling Expenses
candidates.why: This selling-expense depreciation appears as a sub-component under the selected 'Selling Expenses' total, so it should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is a sub-component of the selected 'Administrative Expenses' total and appears already included there.
This depreciation line is shown as part of the selected 'Administrative Expenses' total, not as a separate same-level add-on.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This admin ROU depreciation is presented as a component beneath the selected administrative expense total and should not be added separately.

This R&D amortization appears to be a component of the selected 'Research and development costs' bucket. Also, R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would risk distortion/double counting.
This is a component within the selected R&D expense bucket, and the R&D row is already handled in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. It should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This R&D-related depreciation is presented as a component of the selected R&D total and should not be added separately, especially given the separate XRD handling.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are parent totals for Selling, Administrative, and R&D. The explicit D&A rows beneath them appear to be embedded components that reconcile into those selected totals. Under the R&D interaction rule, separate R&D D&A should also not be added because R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
